projects.name: DictPress
projects.description: Build dictionaries for any language - dictpress is a free and open source, single binary webserver application for building and publishing fast, searchable dictionaries for any language.
projects.short_description: A stand-alone web server application for building and publishing full fledged dictionary websites and APIs for any language.

projects.name: listmonk
projects.description: listmonk is a self-hosted, high performance one-way mailing list and newsletter manager. It comes as a standalone binary and the only dependency is a Postgres database.
projects.short_description: High performance, self-hosted, newsletter and mailing list manager with a modern dashboard. Single binary app.

form.question: How to support
form.response: Use dictpress to build dictionaries, glossaries etc.

form.question: A small brief about your project
form.response: dictpress is a webserver application for building and publishing fast, searchable dictionaries for any language.

form.question: One FOSS maintainer lesson for your younger self
form.response: Learn to say No confidently, where warranted.

form.question: Why do you do it? Why do you bother maintaining a FOSS project?
form.response: I love doing it. I find it joyful and satisfying.

form.question: Which file in your project would you most like to set on fire?
form.response: None. I put in effort to not have inflammable files.

form.question: If you had to use one emoji to convey what it is like to be a FOSS maintainer, what would it be?
